loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing year-to-date active energy (import minus export) and total energy (active + reactive) — subsidy limits, targets, and SEC denominators are not configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active and reactive energy (kWh/kVArh) — rated and contracted power limits (kW/kVA) are not energy quantities and cannot be bound to energy slots.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing YTD energy totals and loss — instantaneous power used for efficiency/loss % as a proxy for energy efficiency.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — expected load, ranges, and event counts are not measured by this asset.
